---
name: Bug report
about: Something doesn't work as expected
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
---

**What happened?**
A clear description of the problem.

**What did you expect?**
What you thought the mouth / device would do.

**Steps to reproduce**
1. ...
2. ...

**Hardware & setup**
- Board: M5Stack Core2
- PlatformIO / framework version (if known):

**Extra**
A photo or short video of the display and serial monitor output (115200 baud)
are very helpful.
